items.description: Permanent and natural-looking replacement for missing teeth using premium titanium implants.

items.title: Pediatric Dentistry
items.description: Gentle and specialized dental care for children in a friendly environment.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find answers to the most common dental questions.

items.question: How often should I visit the dentist?
items.answer: It is generally recommended to visit the dentist every six months for a routine check-up and professional cleaning. However, depending on your oral health, we might recommend more frequent visits.

items.question: Are dental X-rays safe?
items.answer: Yes, dental X-rays are extremely safe. We use modern digital X-ray equipment that emits a very low level of radiation, significantly less than traditional film X-rays.

items.question: What should I do in a dental emergency?
items.answer: In case of a dental emergency, such as a knocked-out tooth, severe pain, or bleeding, contact our clinic immediately. We prioritize emergency cases and will do our best to see you as soon as possible.

items.question: Do you offer treatments for sensitive teeth?
items.answer: Yes, we provide various treatments for tooth sensitivity, ranging from desensitizing toothpaste recommendations to fluoride treatments and dental restorations, depending on the cause.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept cash, credit/debit cards, UPI, and various digital wallets. We also have tie-ups with select insurance providers for cashless treatments.
